scripts.dev: concurrently --names "back,front" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --restart-tries 10 --restart-after 3000 "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "back,front" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --restart-tries 10 --restart-after 3000 "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
